name: bee-logical
description: Bee-Logical company plugin marketplace — reusable AIDLC (AI Development Life Cycle) framework for all projects.

plugins.name: aidlc
plugins.description: AIDLC (AI Development Life Cycle) orchestrator: reads work items (Jira/ADO/markdown), routes them through requirements, planning, implementation, review, QA and PR — across one repo or a multi-repo workspace, with or without a git remote, end to end.

plugins.name: aidlc-stack-web
plugins.description: Default web stack expertise for the AIDLC pipeline: TypeScript standards + strict tooling baseline (ESLint/Prettier/tsconfig/.gitattributes + optional husky/lint-staged) + enterprise project structure (scaffold + dependency-cruiser boundary gate) + CI templates, Next.js, NestJS, Postgres, MongoDB, DB migrations, Docker, API design.

plugins.name: aidlc-ux
plugins.description: Award-tier UI/UX pod: UX-narrative writer, Awwwards inspiration researcher, design-system owner, motion/interaction specialist, and a strict unbiased jury that renders the UI and gates on a ≥9/10 score. New or existing projects, page or whole-app scope, honors brand references (logo/colors/fonts). Enabled by default; it only activates on UI items, so backend-only projects are unaffected.
